values.value: Flags PermissionSet assignments granted in the last 24 hours where the permission set carries Modify All Data, Manage Users, or has a label containing "admin". These permissions effectively elevate the assignee to a privileged role, and every grant should be tied to a documented business reason.

Confirm with the actor and the assignee's manager that the grant was approved and the assignee has a documented need. If not, remove the assignment and review the actor's recent admin activity for further unauthorized changes. If legitimate, attach the approval reference to the finding's resolution notes.
